summary: Deployed end-to-end cybersecurity infrastructure for an international federal government client, including firewall configuration, SIEM implementation, and SOC setup, delivering a comprehensive security framework, a SIEM system, and a fully operational SOC, achieving 99.9% uptime and ISO 27001 compliance within 8 months.

Implemented a full SAP ERP system for a federal government ministry, covering finance, HR, procurement, and asset management modules, delivering customized software, user training, and change management services, resulting in 98% user adoption and on-time completion.

Constructed and rehabilitated 45 km of national highway for a federal government client, including drainage systems, signage, and road markings, delivering a reconstructed highway, improved drainage systems, and updated signage, completing the project with ISO 27001 quality standards and a 20% increase in road safety.

Provided structural engineering and construction services for a 3-span bridge over a major river, including geotechnical surveys, pile foundations, and post-tensioned deck design, delivering a completed bridge structure, geotechnical survey reports, and construction plans, with a 25% reduction in construction time.

Designed and deployed a real-time GPS fleet management and telematics system for 500+ provincial government vehicles, including dashboards, driver scoring, and maintenance alerts, delivering a fully operational system, customized dashboards, and training services, resulting in 95% vehicle tracking efficiency and ISO 27001 compliance.

Implemented an end-to-end Hospital Management Information System covering patient records, pharmacy, billing, lab integration, and bed management for a 600-bed public hospital, delivering training to 500 staff members, integrating with existing lab equipment, and achieving 98% uptime, as a CMMI L3 certified organization.

Procured, installed, and provided 5-year AMC for CT scanners, MRI machines, and digital X-ray units across 10 district hospitals, delivering 25 units, conducting operator training for 50 technicians, and ensuring 95% equipment uptime, having obtained the CE Mark certification.

Designed, supplied, and commissioned 500 kW off-grid solar power systems across 20 remote villages, including battery storage, community training for 100 village representatives, and installation of 500 meters, resulting in 99% reduction in diesel consumption, as an ISO 9001 certified entity.

Designed and deployed a 200 km fiber optic backbone network connecting 15 government facilities with redundant links, set up a NOC, and committed to a 99.9% SLA, delivering network design documents, conducting training for 20 network administrators, and achieving 99.95% network uptime, as a CMMI L3 certified organization.

Built and deployed a scalable Learning Management System for 50,000 students, covering course delivery, assessments, certificates, and analytics dashboards, delivering customized reporting, onboarding 20,000 users within the first month, and ensuring 99.5% system availability, as an ISO 9001 certified organization.

Conducted comprehensive penetration testing and vulnerability assessment for 3 commercial banks, delivering remediation roadmaps, vulnerability reports, and achieving PCI-DSS readiness with 99.9% uptime, as an ISO 27001 certified organization.

Implemented Oracle ERP and MES integration for a large textile manufacturer, enabling real-time production tracking, quality control, and supply chain visibility through customized dashboards, automated workflows, and integrated reporting, as a CMMI L3 certified entity, onboarding 500 users.

Rehabilitated 80 km of rural road network in KPK, including construction of culverts, retaining walls, and storm water management, to NHA specifications, delivering asphalt pavement, drainage systems, and traffic signage, with 95% of the network open to traffic within 20 months.

Designed and supervised the construction of a 120m pedestrian suspension bridge for a remote mountain community in Gilgit-Baltistan, delivering structural designs, construction supervision reports, and handing over a safe and functional bridge, as a CE Mark certified organization, benefiting 5,000 local residents.

Implemented AI-powered route optimization and fleet telematics for a national FMCG distributor with 1,200 vehicles, delivering optimized route plans, real-time vehicle tracking, and fuel consumption analytics, as an ISO 9001 certified organization, reducing fuel cost by 18% and onboarding 800 vehicles within 6 months.

Designed and launched a nationwide telemedicine platform, delivering a web portal, mobile app, and EHR system, connecting 200 rural health centres to specialist doctors in urban hospitals, with 95% uptime, as a CMMI L3 certified organization.

Procured and deployed 300 ICU-grade ventilators and monitoring systems, including installation and training, across 40 public hospitals, achieving 99% equipment uptime, holding a CE Mark certification.

Engineered, procured, and constructed a 2 MW grid-tied solar power plant, delivering a substation, transmission line, and control room, reducing a cement factory's grid dependency by 35%, as an ISO 9001 certified organization.

Deployed an 800-node public Wi-Fi mesh network, including traffic management integration and a citizen portal, achieving 90% network coverage across a metropolitan city, with 500,000 users onboarded, as a CMMI L3 certified organization.

Built a custom LMS for a bank's 8,000-employee workforce, delivering compliance training, certification tracking, and skill-gap reporting modules, with 80% user adoption, supporting SCORM 2004 standards.

Established a 24/7 Security Operations Centre for a major telecom provider, including SIEM tuning, threat intelligence feeds, and Level 1-3 analyst workflows, delivering a security information and event management system, threat intelligence platform, and incident response plan, resulting in 99.9% uptime, as an ISO 27001 certified organization.

Implemented a citizen services ERP for a municipal corporation, covering property tax, utility billing, birth/death registration, and complaint management with a mobile app, delivering a centralized database, web portal, and mobile application, onboarding 500,000 users, for a provincial government client.

Expanded a 30 km expressway section, including asphaltic concrete overlay, barrier systems, and intelligent transport systems installation, delivering asphaltic concrete overlay, crash barriers, and intelligent transport systems, resulting in a 25% increase in traffic volume, as an ISO 27001 certified organization, for a federal government client.

Constructed a 4-span steel girder flyover in a congested urban intersection, including traffic diversion planning, utility relocation, and aesthetic lighting, delivering a 250-meter long flyover, traffic management plan, and utility relocation plan, reducing congestion by 30%, holding a CE Mark certification, for a provincial government client.

Implemented a real-time fleet tracking and dispatch optimization system for 150 emergency ambulances across a provincial health department, delivering a GPS tracking system, dispatch software, and driver training program, reducing response time by 22% and onboarding 300 ambulance drivers.

Deployed an enterprise PACS for a 1,200-bed teaching hospital, covering radiology workflow, teleradiology, and AI-assisted diagnosis, delivering a web-based diagnostic workstation, mobile access for clinicians, and integration with existing hospital information systems, resulting in 99.9% system uptime, and compliant with the CE Mark certification.

Supplied and integrated automated lab analyzers, LIS, and sample tracking systems for 12 diagnostic laboratories, providing a centralized lab management portal, automated sample tracking, and instrument interfaces, yielding 25% increase in lab throughput, and meeting the CE Mark certification standards.

Designed and installed 2,500 solar-powered LED street lights across 30 towns in Sindh, with remote monitoring, self-cleaning panels, and a 10-year warranty, delivering a solar panel mounting structure, battery backup systems, and a network operations center, resulting in 95% reduction in energy consumption, and adhering to ISO 9001 quality management certification.

Overhauled the network infrastructure for a 10,000-student university campus, including core switching, wireless access, SD-WAN, and network security policies, providing a unified network management system, secure network segmentation, and 24/7 monitoring, achieving 99.5% network availability, and following CMMI L3 process guidelines.

Developed a gamified LMS for 300,000 school students in Balochistan, with offline-first capability, Urdu language support, and teacher performance dashboards, delivering interactive learning content, student progress analytics, and a teacher training program, resulting in 80% user adoption rate, and managed under PMP-certified project management practices.

Conducted physical and logical security hardening of a Tier III data centre, delivering access control systems, CCTV analytics, DLP implementation, and compliance audit, achieving 99.9% uptime, and maintaining ISO 27001 certification, with the project valued at PKR 35M.

Implemented Microsoft Dynamics 365 for a large public university, covering finance management, faculty payroll, student fee collection, and procurement workflows, onboarding 10,000 users, under the guidance of a PMP certified project manager, with the project valued at PKR 62M.

Constructed 18 km of mountain road in AJK, including retaining walls, slope stabilization, drainage channels, and snow clearing provisions, ensuring year-round accessibility, with the project valued at PKR 95M, and completed within 30 months.

project_title: Box Culvert and Minor Bridge Works
summary: Constructed 14 box culverts and 3 minor bridges across irrigation canals in Punjab agricultural zone, supporting year-round agricultural transport, with a total span of 500 meters, and valued at PKR 42M, completed within 15 months.

Deployed an RFID-based student tracking, driver behavior monitoring, and route optimization system for 350 school buses, serving 15,000 students, achieving a 25% reduction in transit time, with the project valued at PKR 24M, and completed within 9 months.

Deployed a cloud-based EMR system across 80 clinics, including appointment scheduling, prescription management, insurance claims integration, and a patient mobile app, achieving 99.9% uptime and onboarding 500,000 patients, holding a CMMI L3 certification.

Supplied, installed, and commissioned dental chairs, autoclaves, X-ray units, and compressors for 50 government dental clinics nationwide, delivering 100 dental chairs, 50 autoclaves, and 20 X-ray units, with a CE Mark certification, covering 250,000 patients annually.

Designed and installed solar + battery hybrid backup systems for 25 rural hospitals, ensuring 24/7 power for critical medical equipment during grid outages, delivering 500 kW of solar power, 2000 kWh of battery storage, and reducing grid outage downtime by 90%, holding an ISO 9001 certification.

Redesigned the backbone for a regional ISP serving 500,000 subscribers, including BGP optimization, peering arrangement, DDoS protection, and network redundancy, delivering a 40 Gbps core network, 1000 km of fiber optic cable, and achieving 99.99% network uptime.

Developed a specialized LMS for a medical college with 3D anatomy models, clinical case simulations, OSCE tracking, and integration with hospital rotations, onboarding 10,000 students, delivering 500 interactive modules, and achieving a 25% increase in student engagement.

Implemented SWIFT Customer Security Programme controls for a commercial bank, delivering a comprehensive risk assessment, security awareness training, and incident response planning, achieving full attestation and reducing audit findings from 23 to 0, with the bank maintaining ISO 27001 certification, resulting in 99.9% system uptime.

Implemented SAP S/4HANA for an upstream oil exploration company, covering plant maintenance, materials management, project systems, and HSE module, delivering customized workflows, integration with existing systems, and change management, with the project team holding CMMI L3 certification, resulting in 95% user adoption within the first 6 months.

Constructed a 12 km heavy-duty industrial access road with load-bearing pavement design, weight bridges, and truck turnaround facilities, delivering geological investigation reports, pavement design, and construction supervision services, holding ISO 9001 certification, resulting in a 20% reduction in transportation time for industrial traffic.

Constructed a 6-span pre-stressed concrete bridge over a major irrigation canal using the balanced cantilever method, delivering scour protection, seismic isolation bearings, and structural health monitoring systems, holding CE Mark certification, resulting in a 30% increase in traffic capacity over the canal.

Deployed heavy equipment telemetry and predictive maintenance system for 200 mining machines, delivering real-time monitoring, automated alerts, and data analytics, holding ISO 9001 certification, resulting in 31% reduction in unplanned downtime and 25% reduction in maintenance cost, with 95% of machines onboarded within the first 12 months.

Implemented a centralized blood bank management system for a provincial government client, connecting 8 regional blood banks with donation tracking, compatibility testing, inventory forecasting, and a mobile donor app, delivering a web-based dashboard, mobile application, and training manuals, resulting in 99% system uptime, holding a CMMI L3 certification.

Provided comprehensive maintenance services for 1,200 biomedical devices across a hospital network, including planned preventive maintenance, calibration, and 24-hour emergency repair, delivering maintenance schedules, repair reports, and a dedicated support hotline, ensuring 95% device operational availability, certified with a CE Mark.

Supplied and installed 1,000 solar-powered irrigation pumps for smallholder farmers in Sindh under a federal agricultural development initiative, delivering pumps, solar panels, and mounting structures, resulting in 500 km of irrigated land, holding an ISO 9001 certification.

Designed and implemented a city-wide CCTV surveillance network with 2,000 IP cameras, edge analytics for ANPR and crowd detection, central command center integration, and 30-day storage, delivering camera installations, analytics software, and integration services, resulting in 90% crime reduction in monitored areas, certified with ISO 27001.

Built a bilingual vocational training platform for NAVTTC, covering 120 trade courses, apprenticeship tracking, competency-based assessments, and employer portal, delivering a learning management system, training content, and user guides, onboarding 50,000 users, led by a certified PMP professional.

Designed and built a custom web-based tax filing portal for a federal government revenue authority using Python/Django and React, handling 1.2 million registered filers with peak loads of 40,000 concurrent sessions during filing deadlines. Delivered full SDLC including requirements workshops, UAT, and a 2-year support contract, reducing average filing time from 45 to 12 minutes.

Developed cross-platform iOS and Android citizen services application (Flutter) for a provincial government, integrating 14 departmental services including license renewal, bill payment, and complaint tracking. Achieved 800,000 downloads in the first year with a 4.4-star average rating and biometric login compliant with national digital identity standards.

Migrated a private bank's core workloads from on-premises data centers to a hybrid AWS/Azure cloud architecture: 220 virtual machines, 14 databases, and a containerized microservices middleware layer with zero data loss and under 4 hours of cumulative downtime. Implemented infrastructure-as-code (Terraform), cutting infrastructure costs by 34% annually.

Implemented an enterprise DevOps platform (GitLab CI, Kubernetes, ArgoCD) for an international telecom software vendor, standardizing build and release pipelines across 35 development teams. Reduced average release cycle from 6 weeks to 4 days and production rollback incidents by 71% through automated testing gates and blue-green deployments.

Built a national health data warehouse and business-intelligence layer (PostgreSQL, Apache Airflow, Power BI) for a federal health ministry, consolidating reporting from 600+ facilities into automated daily dashboards. Enabled disease-surveillance reporting that cut outbreak response time from 14 days to 48 hours.

Delivered an AI document-processing system for an international insurance group: OCR plus transformer-based extraction over 25 document types in English and Urdu, processing 90,000 documents per month at 96.2% field-level accuracy. Reduced manual data-entry headcount requirements by 60% and claim turnaround from 9 days to 36 hours.

Engineered a B2B e-commerce marketplace (microservices on Node.js/React, Stripe and local payment-gateway integration) for a private retail conglomerate, onboarding 2,400 wholesale vendors and processing PKR 1.8B in gross merchandise value in its first year. Included vendor portal, logistics integration, and real-time inventory sync across 3 warehouses.

Built the core payments backend for a licensed digital wallet operator: double-entry ledger, PCI-DSS-aligned card tokenization, 1LINK and Raast integration, and fraud-scoring rules engine sustaining 1,100 transactions per second in load testing. Platform now serves 2.5 million wallet accounts with 99.95% uptime since launch.

Developed and operate a multi-tenant HR and payroll SaaS product used by 180 corporate customers across the Gulf region, covering attendance, payroll runs with country-specific tax rules, and employee self-service. Single-instance architecture with tenant data isolation, SOC 2-aligned controls, and 99.9% measured availability over 24 months.

Provide 24/7 managed IT services and ITIL-based helpdesk for a federal government agency: 3,500 end users, 40 branch offices, SLA-backed incident response (P1 under 30 minutes), patch management, and endpoint security administration. Sustained 97.8% first-contact resolution within SLA across a 3-year contract with annual third-party audits.
